title: Vendor
description: A firm doing (or seeking to do) business with DDC — designer, engineer, construction manager, contractor, subcontractor, or allied consultant. DDC has NO structured vendor dataset of its own; a vendor identity is derived from the 'SELECTED FIRM' field of awarded contracts (j7gw-gcxi) and, for onboarding, lives in the citywide PASSPort system managed by the Mayor's Office of Contract Services (MOCS). This schema models the vendor/consultant entity plus its DDC-relevant status.

role.description: Primary role the firm plays on DDC engagements.

mwbe.description: Minority/Women-Owned Business Enterprise (M/WBE) designation, where known.

prequalified.description: Whether the firm holds a current prequalification allowing it to respond to relevant DDC solicitations (tracked in PASSPort/MOCS, not published by DDC).

passportVendorId.description: Citywide PASSPort vendor identifier, where known.

awardedContracts.description: PINs of DDC contracts awarded to this firm.

designExcellence.description: Whether the firm participates in DDC's Design and Construction Excellence roster.
